correlation_clusters.note: 100% agreement because they all output HOLD. They don't vote BUY/SELL but count as 'active voters'. This inflates the voter count without adding information.
All >86% activation, all BUY-biased on XAG. Creating a persistent BUY echo chamber. volume_flow 92% activation, 84% BUY = major BUY bias source.
econ_calendar outputs SELL on every entry for all tickers in recent data. It has 61.4% accuracy overall but may be regime-specific (FOMC proximity).

XAG_trending_up.buy_bias: Strong BUY bias from ema, volume_flow, heikin_ashi, macro_regime, momentum_factors
XAG_trending_up.sell_bias: SELL bias from econ_calendar, mean_reversion, momentum, rsi, bb

BTC_trending_down.key_issue: ema always-on SELL, econ_calendar always SELL. volume_flow 74% SELL. Creates persistent SELL pressure that conflicts with on-chain/fundamental BUY signals.
